# Cleaning With Purpose

> Senior-friendly home cleaning across Metro Detroit. The same trusted person every visit, plus a short note to the family after each one (the "Purpose Note"). A cleaning and family-communication service — not medical or home health care.

## Service area
Metro Detroit, Michigan: Detroit, Dearborn, Royal Oak, Ferndale, Southfield, Troy, Warren, Grosse Pointe, Livonia, and surrounding communities.

## Packages
- Purpose Home Reset — the deeper first visit, from $225–$375 by home size and condition.
- Comfort Clean — recurring senior-friendly cleaning, from $149/visit.
- Peace-of-Mind Visit — recurring cleaning plus the Purpose Note, from $199/visit.
- Purpose Plus — highest-touch recurring care, from $289/visit.

## Contact
Phone/text: 313-451-2221 · Email: info@cleaningwithpurpose.org · Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–4pm

## Pages
- [Home](https://cleaningwithpurpose.org/): offer, the Purpose Note, how it works, pricing, trust, FAQ, and the walkthrough request form.
